message:
fix(mvcc): add overflow guards to CommitSeq allocation and seqlock counter

Add debug_assert checks at every CommitSeq allocation site to catch
overflow before it wraps silently:
- commit_combiner: assert base_seq + pending_count won't overflow
- invariants/TxnManager: assert seq < u64::MAX before use
- write_coordinator: same assert, refactor for readability

Replace wrapping_add with checked_add in CommitSeq::next() so overflow
panics immediately instead of silently wrapping to zero.

Add seqlock wrap-to-zero detection in SharedMemoryLayout::end_snapshot_publish
to catch the (astronomically unlikely) case where the counter wraps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
